1: Let the multitude of isles be glad thereof thereof .
2: Righteousness and judgment are are the habitation of his throne.
3: And burneth up his enemies round about.
5: At the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.
6: And all the people see his glory.
7: That boast themselves of idols: Worship him, all ye ye gods.
8: And the daughters of Judah rejoiced because of thy judgments, O LORD LORD .
9: Thou art exalted far above all gods.
10: He preserveth the souls of his saints; He delivereth them out of the hand of the wicked.
11: And gladness for the upright in heart.
12: And give thanks at the remembrance of his holiness.
